drl:
rule "R0"
salience 8
when
    T1(f2 == true)
    not T0(f0 <= -1)
    accumulate( T1(f1 == true); $a0_2 : count() )
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
end
rule "R1"
when
    T0()
then
    drools.setFocus("gb");
    insert(new T1(100, false, true));
end
rule "R2"
salience -4
when
    (or (and T1(f0 == -1000000007 || f0 > 100) T1(f0 < -5 || f1 != true || !(f2 == true), $b2_1_0 : f2, $b2_1_1 : f2)) (and T1(f0 > -0.5) T1(f0 < -5 || f1 != true || !(f2 == true), $b2_1_0 : f2, $b2_1_1 : f2, f0 != 100)))
then
end
rule "R3"
salience -6
agenda-group "gb"
when
    ( T0($b3_0_0 : f0) )
    or
    ( T0($b3_0_0 : f0, f1 not in (-2.0, 2, 7)) )
then
    insert(new T1(-1000000007, false, false));
end
